metadata.label: gen2/Discord-DBInfra
metadata.title: Software Engineer- Database Infrastructure
metadata.team_direction: Discord is a platform used by over 200 million people for gaming communication and interaction

revision_priority: Add genuine Rust evidence or remove this resume from consideration for this JD because Rust is mandatory.
Rewrite one core experience bullet to show explicit database-infrastructure ownership instead of broad backend/data collaboration.
portfolio_review.main_failure_reason: Add genuine Rust evidence or remove this resume from consideration for this JD because Rust is mandatory.

findings.issue: The 3 summary bullets are noun-led descriptors rather than verb-led bullets, so they read like labels instead of action-oriented summary statements.
findings.fix: Keep the 3-sentence structure, but rewrite each line so the clause after the header starts with a strong verb, e.g. Built/Developed/Applied.

findings.field: ## Professional Summary; TikTok Experience; DiDi Project baselines
findings.issue: Descriptive qualifiers are bolded repeatedly (team-maintained, existing, internal, team-owned, intern-owned, shared), which dilutes the intended bold signal reserved for technologies and quantified outcomes.
findings.fix: Reserve bold for technologies, scope nouns, and quantified results; unbold descriptive modifiers.

findings.issue: The JD must-have Rust is missing from both Skills and the body, so the resume does not visibly cover the full required stack.
findings.fix: If Rust experience is real, add one concrete Rust-based backend bullet in the most relevant experience with the specific component and outcome; otherwise this is a structural mismatch for this JD.

revision_priority: [MUST] Add Rust evidence or treat the Discord JD as a structural mismatch.
[MUST] Remove bolding from qualifiers; keep bold only for technologies and metrics.
[SHOULD] Rework the Summary into verb-led clauses while preserving the 3-sentence structure.
[NICE] Add one explicit database/storage ownership signal in the most relevant backend bullet to sharpen the infra story.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] If you have real Rust work, add one concrete Rust bullet in the most relevant backend experience with the module, stack, and outcome. If not, this Discord role is a poor fit on paper. Also remove bold from descriptive modifiers like team-maintained/internal/existing and keep bold for technologies and metrics. Rewrite the 3 Summary lines so each header is followed by a verb-led clause.
